시편 105:1.content: Give thanks to Yahweh! Call on his name! Make his doings known among the peoples.

시편 105:2.content: Sing to him, sing praises to him! Tell of all his marvelous works.

시편 105:3.content: Glory in his holy name. Let the heart of those who seek Yahweh rejoice.

시편 105:4.content: Seek Yahweh and his strength. Seek his face forever more.

시편 105:5.content: Remember his marvelous works that he has done: his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth,

시편 105:6.content: you offspring of Abraham, his servant, you children of Jacob, his chosen ones.

시편 105:7.content: He is Yahweh, our God. His judgments are in all the earth.

시편 105:8.content: He has remembered his covenant forever, the word which he commanded to a thousand generations,

시편 105:9.content: the covenant which he made with Abraham, his oath to Isaac,

시편 105:10.content: and confirmed it to Jacob for a statute; to Israel for an everlasting covenant,

시편 105:11.content: saying, “To you I will give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance,”

시편 105:12.content: when they were but a few men in number, yes, very few, and foreigners in it.

시편 105:13.content: They went about from nation to nation, from one kingdom to another people.

시편 105:14.content: He allowed no one to do them wrong. Yes, he reproved kings for their sakes,

시편 105:15.content: “Don’t touch my anointed ones! Do my prophets no harm!”

시편 105:16.content: He called for a famine on the land. He destroyed the food supplies.

시편 105:17.content: He sent a man before them. Joseph was sold for a slave.

시편 105:18.content: They bruised his feet with shackles. His neck was locked in irons,

시편 105:19.content: until the time that his word happened, and Yahweh’s word proved him true.

시편 105:20.content: The king sent and freed him, even the ruler of peoples, and let him go free.

시편 105:21.content: He made him lord of his house, and ruler of all of his possessions,

시편 105:22.content: to discipline his princes at his pleasure, and to teach his elders wisdom.

시편 105:23.content: Israel also came into Egypt. Jacob lived in the land of Ham.

시편 105:24.content: He increased his people greatly, and made them stronger than their adversaries.

시편 105:25.content: He turned their heart to hate his people, to conspire against his servants.

시편 105:26.content: He sent Moses, his servant, and Aaron, whom he had chosen.

시편 105:27.content: They performed miracles among them, and wonders in the land of Ham.

시편 105:28.content: He sent darkness, and made it dark. They didn’t rebel against his words.

시편 105:29.content: He turned their waters into blood, and killed their fish.

시편 105:30.content: Their land swarmed with frogs, even in the rooms of their kings.

시편 105:31.content: He spoke, and swarms of flies came, and lice in all their borders.

시편 105:32.content: He gave them hail for rain, with lightning in their land.

시편 105:33.content: He struck their vines and also their fig trees, and shattered the trees of their country.

시편 105:34.content: He spoke, and the locusts came with the grasshoppers, without number,

시편 105:35.content: ate up every plant in their land, and ate up the fruit of their ground.

시편 105:36.content: He struck also all the firstborn in their land, the first fruits of all their manhood.

시편 105:37.content: He brought them out with silver and gold. There was not one feeble person among his tribes.

시편 105:38.content: Egypt was glad when they departed, for the fear of them had fallen on them.

시편 105:39.content: He spread a cloud for a covering, fire to give light in the night.

시편 105:40.content: They asked, and he brought quails, and satisfied them with the bread of the sky.

시편 105:41.content: He opened the rock, and waters gushed out. They ran as a river in the dry places.

시편 105:42.content: For he remembered his holy word, and Abraham, his servant.

시편 105:43.content: He brought his people out with joy, his chosen with singing.

시편 105:44.content: He gave them the lands of the nations. They took the labor of the peoples in possession,

시편 105:45.content: that they might keep his statutes, and observe his laws. Praise Yah!
